free_text: Study of the excited states in 4He through the
4He(g,p)3H reaction
Department of Physics
Bremsttarhlung
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is gas. (4He of 99% chemical
purity)
- Target-thickness: 4 Kg/cm2
target chamber is surrounded by 30 cm paraffin
walls to deduce the background .
to measure the X-ray dose given to the target
was monitored by an air-filled ionization
chamber placed far behind the target chamber.
Calibrated by a Victoreen chamber encased in a
20 cm cube Lucite block.
200 micro meter thick Ilford L4.
Ayano Makinaga
